title: elaphoglossum pallidosquamum
intro: Elaphoglossum pallidosquamum, also known as the pale-scaled Elaphoglossum, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum pallidosquamum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
